desc: List all available databases on disk. Use this first if you do not know which database to search.
Perform RAG search on specific local databases. You MUST provide the target_dbs parameter.
Expand the text context around a specific matched chunk in a database.
添加跨天/跨月的日程。时间格式推荐 YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
获取所有日程，或者根据特定日期 (YYYY-MM-DD) 检索
Parse and extract text from rich/binary documents (e.g., PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX) using MarkItDown. DO NOT use this for plain text or CSV files (use read_file_lines instead).
